name: Agillic A/S
summary: Agillic A/S, a software company, provides marketing platform that enables clients to create and automate data-driven and personalized communication across channels in Denmark and internationally. It offers customer marketing platform that enables omnichannel marketing, which helps clients to communicate with message consistency across channels, such as email, SMS, app push notifications, and digital ads, as well as one-to-one personalization and transgressing the limitations of a segmented approach. The company also provides training and professional services related to on-boarding and setup of infrastructure, template design, and implementation, as well as training of new and existing clients. It serves retail, finance, travel and leisure, and NGO and charity industries, as well as subscription-based businesses. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Copenhagen, Denmark.
